name: Scope-Aware ReAct Agent
short_description: ReAct agent extended with explicit {global, subtask, atomic} granularity tags and a JSONL trajectory writer.

entry_points.name: ScopeAwareReactAgent
entry_points.description: Run the scope-aware ReAct loop with a fixed granularity for all turns; writes a JSONL trajectory log.

entry_points.name: ScriptedModel
entry_points.description: Deterministic helper that replays a fixed list of model completions for unit tests.

entry_points.name: TrajectoryRecord
entry_points.description: Frozen dataclass describing one JSONL record with the canonical six-field schema.

entry_points.name: Action
entry_points.description: Frozen dataclass holding a parsed Action: name (tool or 'Finish') plus args dict.

entry_points.name: AgentResult
entry_points.description: Frozen dataclass returned by ScopeAwareReactAgent.run() with answer, finished flag, turn count, and full trajectory.

entry_points.name: MalformedActionError
entry_points.description: Raised internally when the model emits a malformed Action JSON line; surfaced as <parse_error> in the trajectory log.
